title: SharePoint Online Sharing Link and Invitation Volume
spl:
index=o365 sourcetype="ms:o365:management" Workload=SharePoint earliest=-24h
| where match(Operation, "(?i)Sharing|AnonymousLink|CompanyLink|Invitation")
| eval actor=coalesce(UserId, UserPrincipalName, userId, "")
| stats count by Operation, actor
| sort -count
description: Aggregating sharing, anonymous link, company link, and invitation operations exposes both legitimate collaboration bursts and risky broad sharing that may violate data residency policies.
value: Feeds insider-threat and data-loss programs with a single search correlating multiple SharePoint sharing verbs without waiting for Purview alerts.
implementation: Normalize `Operation` names after Microsoft schema updates. Add domain allow lists for partner tenants when correlating `Sharee` fields (if extracted). Pair with DLP (`ms:o365:dlp`) and CASB where available. Alert on unusual actors or operations rarely seen in baseline.
visualization: Stacked bar (Operation × day), table (top actors), pie (operation mix).
knownFalsePositives: Project folders shared widely during onboarding; guests invited for a single workshop or bid.
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable; primary SPL uses raw or vendor-normalized event fields.
grandmaExplanation: We watch SharePoint sharing and file pulls, so odd permission changes or big downloads are visible before they spread.
